title: The Lantern Map
description: A small group follows a glowing map to find a missing archive before a rival faction reaches it first.

locations.name: Mistfall Harbor
locations.description: A foggy dock district where smugglers, scholars, and sailors trade secrets.

locations.name: The Sunken Archive
locations.description: An underground library sealed beneath the old city canals.

characters.name: Mara Venn
characters.description: A young cartographer who can read magical routes hidden in old maps.
characters.goal: Find the missing archive before its records are destroyed.
characters.knowledge_notes: Knows the map reacts to moonlight.

characters.name: Tobin Reed
characters.description: Mara's older brother and a former canal guard.
characters.goal: Protect Mara and make up for abandoning the city guard.
characters.knowledge_notes: Knows hidden maintenance paths under the harbor.

characters.name: Selene Cross
characters.description: A treasure broker searching for the archive's ownership records.
characters.goal: Claim the archive records and sell them to the highest bidder.
characters.knowledge_notes: Knows someone inside the archive left a false trail.

items.name: Lantern Map
items.description: A folded map that reveals hidden paths when held near flame.
items.significance: Points the group toward the Sunken Archive.

items.name: Brass Tide Key
items.description: A heavy key stamped with an old harbor seal.
items.significance: Unlocks the archive gate during low tide.

scenes.title: The Map Wakes
scenes.summary: Mara and Tobin discover the Lantern Map glowing near the harbor watchtower.
scenes.notes: Selene watches from a nearby rooftop.

scenes.title: The Gate Below
scenes.summary: The group reaches the Sunken Archive and finds Selene waiting at the sealed gate.
scenes.notes: The Brass Tide Key must be used before the water rises.

scene_characters.knowledge_gained: Learns the map responds to lantern flame.
Realizes the map points below the harbor.
Learns the archive gate requires the Brass Tide Key.
Discovers Mara has the real map.

scene_items.purpose_in_scene: Confirms they found the correct gate.

character_relationships.description: Mara and Tobin are siblings who trust each other despite old arguments.
Selene wants the same archive and keeps trying to outmaneuver Mara.
Tobin once arrested Selene, and neither has forgotten it.
